/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/execute_tilelet_matmul_fp32_crosscard.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/execute_tilelet_matmul_fp32_crosscard.dir/work/ops-nn/build/autogen/ascend910_93/aclnnop_resource/TileletMatmulFp32_op_resource.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/execute_tilelet_matmul_fp32_crosscard.dir/tilelet_static_resource_stub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/execute_tilelet_matmul_fp32_crosscard.dir/main_crosscard.cpp.o -o /work/ops-nn/experimental/matmul/tilelet_matmul_fp32/examples/output/execute_tilelet_matmul_fp32_crosscard   -L/work/ops-nn/build  -L/work/ops-nn/build/common/stub/op_api  -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/aarch64-linux/lib64  -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/aarch64-linux/devlib  -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/aarch64-linux/opp/vendors/custom_nn/op_api/lib  -L/usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/aarch64-linux/x86_64-linux/lib64  /work/ops-nn/build/bin_tmp/ascend910_93/libcann_nn_static.a -lmetadef -lc_sec -lopp_registry -lregister -lascendalog -ltiling_api -lplatform -lnnopbase -lopapi_math -lascendcl -lacl_op_compiler /usr/local/Ascend/ascend-toolkit/latest/aarch64-linux/lib64/libunified_dlog.so -lstdc++
